sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70353" key="neoptorqh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νεο-πτορθής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n70353.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with new branches,</tr_> Hdn.Gr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0085.tlg007.perseus-grc1:1:79" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.79</biblScope> </bibl>:—also <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νεό-πτορθος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, as etym.</sense> </entryFree>
